author: claude
content: Design complete: analysed the Redis reliable-WQ (BRPOPLPUSH main->:processing + SETEX lease + :retries hash + lazy WATCH/MULTI requeue in rediswq.py/crawler.py) and designed a PG replacement (single workqueue.tasks table, atomic claim via SELECT...FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED, lease_expires visibility-timeout for auto-requeue, UNIQUE dedupe, drop-in API + prototype pgwq.py). ~2.5-3d effort; main risk is flaky-network reconnect, not queue logic. Doc + prototype: datadir/openwpm-crawler-postgres-wq-design.md. Not pushed; awaiting Stefan review.
